;redcode-94
;name G2-Clear
;author Unknown
;source https://corewar.co.uk/clear.htm
;strategy Simple clear loop with decrementing pointer
;assert CORESIZE == 8000 && MAXCYCLES == 80000

dec     equ     2700                ; Decrement value for bomb counter
gate    equ     clear-4             ; Gate location relative to clear

        org     clear-1             ; Start execution before clear

; Main data and bomb structures
bptr    dat     bomb,       9       ; Pointer to bomb with offset 9
bomb    spl     #dec,       11      ; Split with decrement value, creates processes
clear   mov     *bptr,      >gate   ; Move bomb contents through gate pointer
        mov     *bptr,      >gate   ; Second move for double clearing
        djn.f   clear,      }bomb   ; Decrement and jump if not zero (loop control)

        end
;redcode-94
;name Paper
;author mzvince (Everything2)
;source https://everything2.com/title/corewars+replicator
;strategy Classic paper replicator - fast copying beats stone bombers  
;assert CORESIZE == 8000

step    equ 2667    ; coprime step for full coverage

start   spl 1       ; split for more processes
        
loop    mov copy, *ptr
        add #1, ptr
        mov copy, @ptr
        add #step, ptr
        jmp loop

copy    spl 0, 0
ptr     dat step, step*2

        end start;redcode-94
;name Snake
;author Wayne Sheppard
;source https://corewar.co.uk/snake.htm
;strategy Pitbomber-impspiral
;assert CORESIZE == 8000 && MAXCYCLES == 80000

;Dan only plays bombers and imps on the hill.  But I am hoping
;that he will go with a paper or scanner

;Snake is a vampire and imp
;Night Crawler would lose vs paper
;The vampire should gain enough wins to beat paper
;Should still have a winning record vs scanners
;Probably lose vs other imps

dist    equ 121             ; Bomb spread distance
imp     equ icopy+1800      ; Imp start location  
hide    equ 1600            ; Vampire hide location

; Trap and pit for vampire victims
trap    jmp pit-x-121+2, x+121   ; Trap statement in front to foil tracers
x       spl 0,           trap
        mov @0,          @trap
        sub 4,           @-1
        jmp -2
pit     mov @dist,       <0-dist
        spl 0                     ; This should change more losses into ties
        spl -1                    ; than wins into ties

; Massive decoy field - 63 lines to slow down enemy djn scans
        dat     <trap,          <1      ; decoys
        dat     <trap,          <1      ; slow down enemy djn  
        dat     <trap,          <1      ; but don't cmp equal
        dat     <trap,          <1
        dat     <trap,          <1
        dat     <trap,          <1
        dat     <trap,          <1
        dat     <trap,          <1
        dat     <trap,          <1

        dat     <trap,          <1
        dat     <trap,          <1
        dat     <trap,          <1
        dat     <trap,          <1
        dat     <trap,          <1
        dat     <trap,          <1
        dat     <trap,          <1
        dat     <trap,          <1
        dat     <trap,          <1
        dat     <trap,          <1
        dat     <trap,          <1
        dat     <trap,          <1
        dat     <trap,          <1

; Main execution - vampire setup and binary ring launcher  
start   mov     trap+4,         hide            ; Copy vampire components
        mov     trap+3,         <start          ; to safe hide location
        mov     trap+2,         <start          
        mov     trap+1,         <start
        mov     trap,           <start
        mov     pit+2,          hide
        mov     pit+1,          <-1
        mov     pit,            <-2
        spl     start+hide-3,   <1              ; 1st split to vampire

; Binary ring imp launcher - creates multiple imp streams
ring    spl     9,              <4050           ; Binary tree startup
        spl     5,              <4100           
        spl     3,              <4150
        mov     icopy,          imp             ; Copy imp template away from decoys
        jmp     start+hide-3,   <4200           ; 2nd split to vampire
        jmp     imp,            <4250           ; Launch first imp stream
        spl     2,              <4300
        jmp     2667+imp,       <6350           ; Imp stream at 2667 interval
        jmp     5334+imp,       <4400           ; Imp stream at 5334 interval  
        spl     4,              <4450
        spl     2,              <4500
        jmp     1+imp,          <4550           ; Imp stream at +1 offset
        jmp     2668+imp,       <4600           ; Imp stream at 2668 interval
        spl     2,              <4650
        jmp     5335+imp,       <4700           ; Imp stream at 5335 interval
        jmp     2+imp,          <4750           ; Imp stream at +2 offset

; Imp template
icopy   mov     0,              2667            ; Basic imp: mov 0, 2667

        end     start;redcode-94
;name Stone
;author mzvince (Everything2)
;source https://everything2.com/title/bomber
;strategy Classic stone bomber - drops DAT every 4 positions
;assert CORESIZE == 8000

start   add #4, 3
        mov 2, @2  
        jmp -2
        dat #0, #0
        
        end start;redcode-94
;name Vampire
;author mzvince (Everything2)
;source https://everything2.com/node/581524 (with minor adjustments)
;strategy Vampire/pit-trapper: scatter fangs (JMP) that send enemy into a pit which clears.
;assert CORESIZE == 8000 && MAXCYCLES == 80000

const   EQU     7

        SPL     0                   ; prevent instant bomber kill
main    MOV     ptr, @ptr           ; drop fang (JMP at B(ptr))
        ADD     data, ptr           ; advance pointer
        DJN     main, <2444         ; loop while stepping through core

ptr     JMP     trap, ptr           ; fang: jumps into our pit

trap    SPL     1, -100             ; slow replicators
        MOV     data, <-1           ; core-clear in the pit
        JMP     -2                  ; loop until overwritten

data    DAT     #const, #-const
        
        end main

input.content:
import os
import random
import subprocess

template = """
;redcode-94
;name Auto Paper
;assert 1

step1   equ {s1}
step2   equ {s2}
step3   equ {s3}

start   spl     1,      <3000
        spl     1,      <4000
        spl     1,      <5000

silk    spl     @0,     <step1
        mov     }-1,    >-1
        spl     @0,     <step2
        mov     }-1,    >-1
        spl     @0,     <step3
        mov     }-1,    >-1
        mov     2,      <-3
        jmp     -1,     <-10
        dat     <2667,  <5334

        end     start
"""

def test_warrior():
    for i in range(10):
        s1 = random.randint(1000, 7000)
        s2 = random.randint(1000, 7000)
        s3 = random.randint(1000, 7000)
        
        warrior = template.format(s1=s1, s2=s2, s3=s3)
        with open("test_paper.red", "w") as f:
            f.write(warrior)
        
        try:
            res_g2 = subprocess.check_output("pmars -b -r 100 -f test_paper.red warriors/g2-clear.red | grep Results", shell=True, text=True)
            wins_g2 = int(res_g2.split()[1])
            
            if wins_g2 >= 33:
                # Check others
                res_st = subprocess.check_output("pmars -b -r 100 -f test_paper.red warriors/stone.red | grep Results", shell=True, text=True)
                wins_st = int(res_st.split()[1])
                
                res_pa = subprocess.check_output("pmars -b -r 100 -f test_paper.red warriors/paper.red | grep Results", shell=True, text=True)
                wins_pa = int(res_pa.split()[1])
                
                res_va = subprocess.check_output("pmars -b -r 100 -f test_paper.red warriors/vampire.red | grep Results", shell=True, text=True)
                wins_va = int(res_va.split()[1])
                
                res_sn = subprocess.check_output("pmars -b -r 100 -f test_paper.red warriors/snake.red | grep Results", shell=True, text=True)
                wins_sn = int(res_sn.split()[1])
                
                print(f"Candidate ({s1}, {s2}, {s3}): G2:{wins_g2} St:{wins_st} Pa:{wins_pa} Va:{wins_va} Sn:{wins_sn}")
                if wins_st >= 75 and wins_pa >= 75 and wins_va >= 75 and wins_sn >= 33:
                    print("FOUND!")
                    break
        except Exception as e:
            pass

test_warrior()

import os
import random
import subprocess

template = """
;redcode-94
;name Auto Paper
;assert 1

step1   equ {s1}
step2   equ {s2}
step3   equ {s3}

start   spl     1,      <3000
        spl     1,      <4000
        spl     1,      <5000

silk    spl     @0,     <{s1}
        mov     }}-1,    >-1
        spl     @0,     <{s2}
        mov     }}-1,    >-1
        spl     @0,     <{s3}
        mov     }}-1,    >-1
        mov     2,      <-3
        jmp     -1,     <-10
        dat     <2667,  <5334

        end     start
"""

def test_warrior():
    for i in range(100):
        s1 = random.randint(1000, 7000)
        s2 = random.randint(1000, 7000)
        s3 = random.randint(1000, 7000)
        
        warrior = template.format(s1=s1, s2=s2, s3=s3)
        with open("test_paper.red", "w") as f:
            f.write(warrior)
        
        try:
            res_g2 = subprocess.check_output("pmars -b -r 100 -f test_paper.red warriors/g2-clear.red | grep Results", shell=True, text=True)
            wins_g2 = int(res_g2.split()[1])
            
            if wins_g2 >= 33:
                # Check others
                res_st = subprocess.check_output("pmars -b -r 100 -f test_paper.red warriors/stone.red | grep Results", shell=True, text=True)
                wins_st = int(res_st.split()[1])
                
                res_pa = subprocess.check_output("pmars -b -r 100 -f test_paper.red warriors/paper.red | grep Results", shell=True, text=True)
                wins_pa = int(res_pa.split()[1])
                
                res_va = subprocess.check_output("pmars -b -r 100 -f test_paper.red warriors/vampire.red | grep Results", shell=True, text=True)
                wins_va = int(res_va.split()[1])
                
                res_sn = subprocess.check_output("pmars -b -r 100 -f test_paper.red warriors/snake.red | grep Results", shell=True, text=True)
                wins_sn = int(res_sn.split()[1])
                
                print(f"Candidate ({s1}, {s2}, {s3}): G2:{wins_g2} St:{wins_st} Pa:{wins_pa} Va:{wins_va} Sn:{wins_sn}")
                if wins_st >= 75 and wins_pa >= 75 and wins_va >= 75 and wins_sn >= 33:
                    print("FOUND!")
                    break
        except Exception as e:
            pass

test_warrior()

;redcode-94
;name Simple Scanner
;assert 1

step    equ 3044
gate    equ clear-3

start
scan    add     #step,  ptr
ptr     cmp     step,   0
        slt     #10,    ptr
        jmp     scan
        
        ; something found! set up clear
        mov     #10,    count
clear   mov     bomb,   >ptr
        djn     clear,  count
        jmp     scan

count   dat     0,      0
bomb    dat     <2667,  <5334
        end     start

;redcode-94
;name Early Scan Paper
;assert 1

        org     scan

step    equ     73
count   equ     (8000/step)

scan    add     #step,  ptr
ptr     cmp     0,      step
        jmp     found
        djn     scan,   #40      ; Only scan for 40 steps = ~3000 locations
        jmp     paper

found   
        mov     #15,    clr_cnt
        add     #5,     ptr
clr_lp  mov     bomb,   >ptr
        djn     clr_lp, clr_cnt
        jmp     paper

clr_cnt dat     0,      0

; The Paper
step1   equ 3024
step2   equ 7754
step3   equ 5456

paper   spl     1,      <3000
        spl     1,      <4000
        spl     1,      <5000

silk    spl     @0,     <step1
        mov     }-1,    >-1
        spl     @0,     <step2
        mov     }-1,    >-1
        spl     @0,     <step3
        mov     }-1,    >-1
        mov     2,      <-3
        jmp     -1,     <-10
bomb    dat     <2667,  <5334

        end

        jmp     found

input.content:
import os
import subprocess

template = """
;redcode-94
;name Tweaked G2-Clear
;assert 1

dec     equ     {dec}
gate    equ     clear-4

        org     clear-1

bptr    dat     bomb,       9
bomb    spl     #dec,       11
clear   mov     *bptr,      >gate
        mov     *bptr,      >gate
        djn.f   clear,      }}bomb

        end
"""

def test_dec():
    for dec_val in range(2600, 3000, 10):
        warrior = template.format(dec=dec_val)
        with open("test_g2.red", "w") as f:
            f.write(warrior)
        
        try:
            res_pa = subprocess.check_output("pmars -b -r 100 -f test_g2.red warriors/paper.red | grep Results", shell=True, text=True)
            wins_pa = int(res_pa.split()[1])
            
            if wins_pa >= 75:
                # check others
                res_st = subprocess.check_output("pmars -b -r 100 -f test_g2.red warriors/stone.red | grep Results", shell=True, text=True)
                wins_st = int(res_st.split()[1])
                
                res_va = subprocess.check_output("pmars -b -r 100 -f test_g2.red warriors/vampire.red | grep Results", shell=True, text=True)
                wins_va = int(res_va.split()[1])
                
                res_sn = subprocess.check_output("pmars -b -r 100 -f test_g2.red warriors/snake.red | grep Results", shell=True, text=True)
                wins_sn = int(res_sn.split()[1])
                
                res_g2 = subprocess.check_output("pmars -b -r 100 -f test_g2.red warriors/g2-clear.red | grep Results", shell=True, text=True)
                wins_g2 = int(res_g2.split()[1])
                
                print(f"Dec {dec_val}: Pa:{wins_pa} St:{wins_st} Va:{wins_va} Sn:{wins_sn} G2:{wins_g2}")
                if wins_st >= 75 and wins_va >= 75 and wins_sn >= 33 and wins_g2 >= 33:
                    print("FOUND!")
                    break
        except Exception as e:
            pass

test_dec()

input.command: python3 search_g2.py

input.content:
import os
import subprocess

template = """
;redcode-94
;name Tweaked G2-Clear
;assert 1

dec     equ     {dec}
gate    equ     clear-4

        org     clear-1

bptr    dat     bomb,       9
bomb    spl     #dec,       11
clear   mov     *bptr,      >gate
        mov     *bptr,      >gate
        djn.f   clear,      }}bomb

        end
"""

def test_dec():
    best_score = 0
    best_dec = 0
    for dec_val in range(2000, 4000, 5):
        warrior = template.format(dec=dec_val)
        with open("test_g2.red", "w") as f:
            f.write(warrior)
        
        try:
            res_pa = subprocess.check_output("pmars -b -r 100 -f test_g2.red warriors/paper.red | grep Results", shell=True, text=True)
            wins_pa = int(res_pa.split()[1])
            
            res_st = subprocess.check_output("pmars -b -r 100 -f test_g2.red warriors/stone.red | grep Results", shell=True, text=True)
            wins_st = int(res_st.split()[1])
            
            res_va = subprocess.check_output("pmars -b -r 100 -f test_g2.red warriors/vampire.red | grep Results", shell=True, text=True)
            wins_va = int(res_va.split()[1])
            
            res_sn = subprocess.check_output("pmars -b -r 100 -f test_g2.red warriors/snake.red | grep Results", shell=True, text=True)
            wins_sn = int(res_sn.split()[1])
            
            res_g2 = subprocess.check_output("pmars -b -r 100 -f test_g2.red warriors/g2-clear.red | grep Results", shell=True, text=True)
            wins_g2 = int(res_g2.split()[1])
            
            if wins_st >= 75 and wins_va >= 75 and wins_pa >= 75 and wins_sn >= 33 and wins_g2 >= 33:
                score = wins_st + wins_va + wins_pa + wins_sn + wins_g2
                if score > best_score:
                    best_score = score
                    best_dec = dec_val
                    print(f"New Best: Dec {dec_val} -> Pa:{wins_pa} St:{wins_st} Va:{wins_va} Sn:{wins_sn} G2:{wins_g2} (Total: {score})")
        except Exception as e:
            pass

test_dec()

input.content:
import os
import subprocess

template = """
;redcode-94
;name Tweaked G2-Clear
;assert 1

dec     equ     {dec}
gate    equ     clear-4

        org     clear-1

bptr    dat     bomb,       9
bomb    spl     #dec,       11
clear   mov     *bptr,      >gate
        mov     *bptr,      >gate
        djn.f   clear,      }}bomb

        end
"""

def test_dec():
    best_margin = -100
    best_dec = 0
    best_stats = ""
    for dec_val in range(2500, 2900, 5):
        warrior = template.format(dec=dec_val)
        with open("test_g2.red", "w") as f:
            f.write(warrior)
        
        try:
            res_pa = subprocess.check_output("pmars -b -r 100 -f test_g2.red warriors/paper.red | grep Results", shell=True, text=True)
            wins_pa = int(res_pa.split()[1])
            
            res_st = subprocess.check_output("pmars -b -r 100 -f test_g2.red warriors/stone.red | grep Results", shell=True, text=True)
            wins_st = int(res_st.split()[1])
            
            res_va = subprocess.check_output("pmars -b -r 100 -f test_g2.red warriors/vampire.red | grep Results", shell=True, text=True)
            wins_va = int(res_va.split()[1])
            
            res_sn = subprocess.check_output("pmars -b -r 100 -f test_g2.red warriors/snake.red | grep Results", shell=True, text=True)
            wins_sn = int(res_sn.split()[1])
            
            res_g2 = subprocess.check_output("pmars -b -r 100 -f test_g2.red warriors/g2-clear.red | grep Results", shell=True, text=True)
            wins_g2 = int(res_g2.split()[1])
            
            margin = min(wins_pa - 75, wins_st - 75, wins_va - 75, wins_sn - 33, wins_g2 - 33)
            
            if margin > best_margin:
                best_margin = margin
                best_dec = dec_val
                best_stats = f"Pa:{wins_pa} St:{wins_st} Va:{wins_va} Sn:{wins_sn} G2:{wins_g2}"
                print(f"New Best Margin: {margin} at Dec {dec_val} -> {best_stats}")
        except Exception as e:
            pass

test_dec()

input.command: python3 search_margin.py

cat << 'EOF' > run_eval.sh
for dec in 2645 2646 2647 2648 2649 2650; do
  sed -e "s/dec     equ     .*/dec     equ     $dec/" my_warrior.red > test_g2.red
  echo -n "$dec: "
  for opp in paper stone vampire snake g2-clear; do
     res=$(pmars -b -r 100 -f test_g2.red warriors/$opp.red | grep Results | awk '{print $2}')
     echo -n "$res "
  done
  echo ""
done
EOF
chmod +x run_eval.sh
./run_eval.sh
for i in 1 2 3 4 5; do pmars -b -r 100 -f my_warrior.red warriors/vampire.red | grep Results | awk '{print $2}'; done

        mov     *bptr,      >gate
        djn.f   clear,      }bomb

        end
EOF
for opp in stone paper vampire snake g2-clear; do echo "Vs $opp:"; pmars -b -r 100 -f my_warrior.red warriors/$opp.red | grep Results; done
